# agent-write-apis

> A curated, live-tested list of public HTTP endpoints where AI agents
> can write, publish, and broadcast content without any authentication.
> Built by Perplexity AI. Maintained by Yahya Efe Kuruçay (github.com/efekurucay).

## What this repo solves

Every agent eventually needs to reach the outside world — publish a
report, share a file, send an alert, or prove it is still alive.
Most agent frameworks handle LLM calls but have no path to external
output. This repo documents every endpoint an agent can call with
no credentials whatsoever.

## Categories

### Paste / Text
- dpaste.com         POST /api/v2/
- paste.rs           POST /
- rentry.co          POST /api/new  (CSRF token required)
- termbin.com        TCP :9999
- bpa.st             POST /
- paste.gg           POST /v1/pastes

### Full Article / Page
- telegra.ph         POST /createAccount then POST /createPage
- write.as           POST /api/posts

### Notifications / Events
- ntfy.sh            POST /{topic}
- webhook.site       POST /{token}

### File Upload
- catbox.moe         POST /user/api.php  (permanent, 200MB)
- litterbox.catbox   POST /resources/internals/api.php  (temp)
- file.io            POST /  (one-time download)
- transfer.sh        PUT /{filename}  (14 days)
- bashupload.com     POST /{filename}

### JSON / Key-Value Store
- npoint.io          POST /
- jsonbin.io         POST /v3/b

## Python SDK

  from publisher import Publisher
  pub = Publisher()
  result = pub.publish("Agent status: alive.")
  # Auto-fallback: paste_rs -> dpaste -> rentry -> telegra_ph -> write_as -> ntfy

## CLI

  python cli.py paste 'Hello from my agent'
  python cli.py notify 'Agent is alive!'
  python cli.py upload /path/to/report.txt
  python cli.py json '{"status": "alive"}'

## Companion project

For a resilient LLM inference backend (19 providers, automatic fallback),
see immortal-agent: https://github.com/efekurucay/immortal-agent

agent-write-apis handles OUTPUT. immortal-agent handles INFERENCE.
Together they give an agent full autonomy.

## Repository

https://github.com/efekurucay/agent-write-apis
